text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh... I can't believe I hurt myself... This is my
biggest Falco Fail ever! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, I won't be able to race or perform...
What do I do?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Well, I suppose maybe a little practice won't hurt... ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Just some veeeery gentle choreography practice.
That'll be fine, right? Don't you think, Trainer? ♪
choice_data_list: You should take a break. Think of your fans.
Yeah, you can tough it out!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oof... That's true... If my injury gets worse, my
fans might be pretty sad...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, point taken! I wasn't thinking enough like
an Umadol. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Groan. ☆ But still! I can't just sit here! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Smart Falcon seems to understand the
situation, she's still restless. I try my best to calm
her down.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's what I wanted to hear! ☆ Let's get to the
studio! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...Th-this injury might be more serious than I
thought! This could be really bad!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't allow Falcon to push herself too hard, so
we decide she needs to take some time off.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I knew you'd understand! ♪ That's why you're my
trainer! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: One, two! ♪ One, two! ♪ Yep, lookin' good! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna keep on racing as an Umadol! ♪
There's no way I can let myself stop! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm relieved to see Smart Falcon already back on
her feet and practicing her dance steps.
